PRVDR_PRFT_STUS_CD 
LABEL: 
Provider Profit Status Code — Latest in Year 
DESCRIPTION: A code denoting the profit status of the provider; most recent in the calendar year.

LONG NAME: PRVDR_PRFT_STUS_CD
